chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.02 of 2024 Ilyas Mahida Versus United Bank Limited & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply “A” 2. For orders on CMA 65/24 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 66/24 Dated: 29.03.2024 Mr. Abdul Shakoor for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant submits that the parties have amicably settled their dispute out of the Court and hence he has been instructed not to press this appeal. Instant First Appeal is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
